text: case_load_and_capacity - Ituri CTE saturation reached 84.1% with an estimated gap of about 20 isolation centers. - Response: Accelerate CTE construction and expansion and deploy additional temporary isolation structures.

text: contact_followup_gap - Contact follow-up reached 70.8% versus the 95% target (a 24.2 pp gap). - Response: Train, deploy, and motivate community relays (RECO) with reinforced supervision.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: unlocalized_confirmed_cases - Seventeen Ituri confirmed cases remain not yet precisely ventilated by health zone. - Response: Conduct data reconciliation, duplicate cleanup, field verification, and reclassification.

text: health_worker_infections - SitRep38 challenge table reports 78 health-worker infections and 18 deaths (CFR 23.1%). - Response: Reinforce IPC/WASH supplies (PPE, chlorine), supervision, and training.

text: lab_backlog - Nord-Kivu carries a laboratory backlog of 52 pending samples (Beni 4, Butembo 48) amid a 54.9% provincial CFR. - Response: Deploy a laboratory catch-up plan and reinforce diagnostic capacity.
